chunks.text: Early in the morning, I was walking through town with my family.
First, we stopped at the bookstore near the station
and I chose a book to send to my grandmother.
“ Next, let's visit grandfather at the hospital,” my mother said.
Grandfather has been a little sick since last month.
In his bed, he smiled gently and welcomed us.
On the way back, we did some shopping at the supermarket.
Fresh vegetables and fruit were beautifully arranged.
On our way, we passed an old church standing quietly on a small hill.
Next to it, there was an old temple.
Both are important buildings that protect the quiet of our town.
My father stopped at his office for some work.
My sister and I read books at the large station waiting room.
In the evening, we stopped at a farm shop and bought roasted sweet potatoes.
we could see the small lights of a factory in the distance.
